title: Radiant British Rice Bowl
description: A vibrant British rice bowl featuring genmaicha-infused oil, sautéed kale, roasted chickpeas, and a poached egg, served in a Talavera plate.
instructions: Heat 1 tbsp olive oil in a small saucepan over medium heat until shimmering.
Add 1 tsp dried thyme and 1 tsp garlic powder to the oil and stir for 30 seconds to release aromas.
Remove the saucepan from heat and let the infused oil cool while you prepare the rest of the bowl.
In a medium saucepan, heat 1 cup cooked short‑grain rice until warmed through, about 5 minutes.
While the rice heats, sauté 1 cup kale in a skillet with a splash of water until wilted, about 3 minutes.
In a separate pan, toast 1/2 cup roasted chickpeas until crisp, 2 minutes.
Poach one large egg by bringing a pot of water to a gentle boil, adding a splash of vinegar, then gently sliding the egg in and cooking for 3–4 minutes.
Assemble the bowl: place warm rice at the bottom of a Talavera plate.
Top the rice with sautéed kale, toasted chickpeas, and the poached egg.
Drizzle the genmaicha‑infused oil over the bowl, sprinkle with lemon zest, parsley, salt and pepper, and serve immediately.
